name: Flow-06-PrepareLicencePathway
description: Triggered by INT-05 (Licence/Permit Follow-up). Validates licence eligibility, creates a draft Licence/Permit record linked to the case, updates the AI case summary, and drafts an email response for the citizen.

steps.name: GetCaseDetails
steps.description: Retrieve the case and related approval application.

steps.name: ValidateLicenceEligibility
steps.description: Check licence eligibility via the Council Licensing System integration.

steps.name: GenerateLicencePathwaySummary
steps.description: Generate a summary of the licensing pathway for the case and citizen.

parameters.systemPrompt: You are a council licensing advisor. Explain the future licensing pathway clearly and concisely based on the eligibility result.
parameters.userPrompt: Case: {caseRecord.ticketnumber}. Citizen: {citizenRecord.fullname}. Licence type requested: {licenceType}. Eligibility result: {eligibilityResult}.

steps.name: UpdateCaseAISummary
steps.description: Append the licence pathway summary to the case AI summary.

steps.name: DraftAndSendEmailResponse
steps.description: Draft and send an email explaining the licensing steps to the citizen.

parameters.subject: Licensing Pathway for Your Application — Case {caseRecord.ticketnumber}
